endpoints.name: List collections
endpoints.description: This operation returns a list of your Pinecone collections.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PINECONE_API_KEY}} with your PINECONE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Describe collection
endpoints.description: Get a description of a collection.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PINECONE_API_KEY}} with your PINECONE API KEY. Replace {{COLLECTIONNAME}} with a real collectionname.

endpoints.name: Describe Index Stats
endpoints.description: The `DescribeIndexStats` operation returns statistics about the index's contents, including the vector count per namespace and the number of dimensions.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PINECONE_API_KEY}} with your PINECONE API KEY.

endpoints.name: List indexes
endpoints.description: This operation returns a list of your Pinecone indexes.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PINECONE_API_KEY}} with your PINECONE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Describe index
endpoints.description: Get a description of an index.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PINECONE_API_KEY}} with your PINECONE API KEY. Replace {{INDEXNAME}} with a real indexname.

endpoints.name: Query
endpoints.description: The `Query` operation searches a namespace, using a query vector. It retrieves the ids of the most similar items in a namespace, along with their similarity scores.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PINECONE_API_KEY}} with your PINECONE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Delete
endpoints.description: The `Delete` operation deletes vectors, by id, from a single namespace. You can delete items by their id, from a single namespace.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PINECONE_API_KEY}} with your PINECONE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Fetch
endpoints.description: The `Fetch` operation looks up and returns vectors, by ID, from a single namespace. The returned vectors include the vector data and/or metadata.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PINECONE_API_KEY}} with your PINECONE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Fetch
endpoints.description: The `Update` operation updates vector in a namespace. If a value is included, it will overwrite the previous value. If a set_metadata is included, the values of the fields specified in it will be added or overwrite the previous value.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PINECONE_API_KEY}} with your PINECONE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Upsert
endpoints.description: The Upsert operation writes vectors into a namespace. If a new value is upserted for an existing vector id, it will overwrite the previous value.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PINECONE_API_KEY}} with your PINECONE API KEY.
